heading: Use of Government facilities
label: 50504 Use of Government facilities
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)50504.15 U.S.C. 5807, , .Pub. L. 102–588, title V, § 508106 Stat. 5128Nov. 4, 1992
amendments: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)50504.15 U.S.C. 5807, , .Pub. L. 102–588, title V, § 508106 Stat. 5128Nov. 4, 1992

children.label: A
children.text: the facilities will be used to support commercial space activities;

children.label: B
children.text: such use can be supported by existing or planned Federal resources;

children.label: C
children.text: such use is compatible with Federal activities;

children.label: D
children.text: equivalent commercial services are not available on reasonable terms; and

children.label: E
children.text: such use is consistent with public safety, national security, and international treaty obligations.

children.heading: .—Consultation
children.label: 2 .—Consultation
children.text: In carrying out paragraph (1)(E), each agency head shall consult with appropriate Federal officials.

children.heading: .—Amount
children.label: 1 .—Amount
children.text: The reimbursement referred to in subsection (a) may be an amount equal to the direct costs (including salaries of United States civilian and contractor personnel) incurred by the United States as a result of the use of such facilities by the private sector. For the purposes of this paragraph, the term “direct costs” means the actual costs that can be unambiguously associated with such use, and would not be borne by the United States Government in the absence of such use.

children.heading: .—Credit to appropriation
children.label: 2 .—Credit to appropriation
children.text: The amount of any payment received by the United States for use of facilities under this subsection shall be credited to the appropriation from which the cost of providing such facilities was paid.
